NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO DECLARE PLTF A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT MODENA, MICHELE HEARING SET FOR MAY-29-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-29-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MICHELE MODENA'S MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS REPEATEDLY RE-LITIGATED THESE ISSUES AFTER THEY WERE FINALLY DETERMINED AGAINST HIM. PLAINTIFF MAY NOT CONTINUE THIS LITIGATION WITHOUT POSTING AN UNDERTAKING OF $1,500.00 WITHIN 15 DAYS. PLAINTIFF MAY NOT FILE NEW LITIGATION WITHOUT FIRST OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, UNLESS HE IS REPRESENTED BY AN ATTORNEY. THE CLERK OF THE COURT IS DIRECTED TO NOTIFY THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF THIS ORDER AS PROVIDED BY CCP SECTION 391.7(E). ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-09-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
